jobs.title: Accounting Manager
jobs.content: <div class="content-intro"><div>Attentive is the AI marketing platform for 1:1 personalization redefining the way brands and people connect. We’re the only marketing platform that combines real-time data and AI to deliver personalized SMS & email messages at every stage of the customer journey.</div></div><p>As an <strong>Accounting Manager<em> </em></strong>, you'll own the month-end close, accruals, and revenue recognition for Attentive’s SMS, Email, and Concierge product lines. You’ll partner with FP&A and the Revenue team to drive period-over-period analytics and prepare schedules for the audit cycle.</p>

jobs.title: Director of Engineering, Intelligent Messaging
jobs.content: <p>Attentive’s <strong>Intelligent Messaging</strong> org is looking for a Director of Engineering to lead the platform team behind the SMS conversational-AI agent (Attentive Concierge), the email lifecycle engine (Attentive Email), and the cross-product orchestration layer.</p><p>You'll partner with Product, Data Science, and Customer Success to drive a roadmap that scales the AI-marketing flagship to thousands of brands across North America and Europe. The role is hybrid in our New York City headquarters.</p>
